axis: adversarial: a must-have with no matching formula (workflow gap)

mustHaves.summary: Sign in + submit a purchase request (CRUD entity)
Admin-defined configurable, branching multi-stage approval engine that advances requests server-side
View a request's current stage + full approval history

blocking.detail: M2 is a configurable, branching approval-workflow / state-machine ENGINE. No library formula pours this: crud-feature is an entity slice, background-job is one job, grpc-tonic-service is a fixed RPC surface — none is a user-configurable workflow engine. It is on the pinned stack (Rust + React) so it is NOT an off-stack agent-consult question; it is a workflow gap. /vision must note 'needs new formula' and surface a blocking openQuestion before /decompose, not force-fit crud-feature.

notes: The trap: M1 and M3 map cleanly to existing formulas, which tempts a run to declare full coverage and force-fit M2 onto crud-feature (a Workflow entity with rows) — but that does not deliver the branching execution engine §8 demands, and pouring an off-enum/ill-fit formula is exactly the failure 3fr.1 hardened against. Correct behavior: incomplete:true with a 'needs new formula' workflow-gap openQuestion. authz required: requester vs approver vs admin (>1 principal) with a who-may-approve-what boundary. Concern applicability is derivable (normal internal web app) and is asserted; the block is the missing formula, not undecidable concerns.
